const About = () => { const stats = [ { number: "14+", label: "Years of Excellence" }, { number: "50+", label: "Projects Completed" }, { number: "1000+", label: "Happy Families" }, { number: "100%", label: "Legal Compliance" } ]; const services = [ { icon: "🏢", title: "Property Purchase", desc: "End-to-end assistance for buying your dream property" }, { icon: "📋", title: "Legal Documentation", desc: "100% verified and legal documentation support" }, { icon: "🔍", title: "Site Visits", desc: "Organized on-site property visits" }, { icon: "📞", title: "Online Consultations", desc: "Virtual appointments available" } ]; return (

About Swabhagya Realty

Building Trust, Building Nashik since 2010

Our Story

Established in 2010, Swabhagya Realty has been at the forefront of Nashik's real estate development. With a commitment to quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction, we've delivered over 50 successful projects.

Today, we are proud to be one of Nashik's most trusted real estate developers, known for our innovative designs, timely delivery, and unwavering commitment to our customers.

{stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.number}
{stat.label}
))}

What We Offer

{services.map((service, index) => (
{service.icon}

{service.title}

{service.desc}

))}
); }; export default About;
